name: Insight
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Vision +1 during exploration, gain [StateArg1] Black Sigil after the map is fully revealed. At the start of Boss Battles, {Weakness} and {Vulnerable} all enemies for 1 turn. In the {Astral Reign}, the effect is changed to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."
